title: Marketing Manager
description:
We are looking for a creative and result-oriented Marketing Manager to take on the responsibility of our marketing strategies on various platforms.

Our ideal candidate should be eager to support his/her team members to create fresh and insightful content that is outcome focused. He/she is required to work closely across different departments to support areas of lead generation, brand awareness, advertising and promotional needs.

For this position, it’s essential to be up-to-date with new technologies and marketing trends to lead our company’s digital marketing efforts.

Responsibilities: 

  • Develop a strong understanding of the fengshui business and market landscape, providing insight through market segmentation, positioning, trends, and growth opportunities.
  • Build and sustain compelling brand positioning and storytelling across all platforms, ensuring clarity, consistency, and relevance.
  • Plan and execute integrated, multi-channel marketing programmes across digital platforms, social media, PR, and offline touchpoints to strengthen market presence.
  • Lead the development of high-impact marketing assets, including but not limited to digital content, video materials, articles, and social media narratives, to enhance visibility and audience engagement.
  • Manage end-to-end campaign development, from strategic planning through to execution, with ongoing evaluation to maximise effectiveness.
  • Plan and oversee marketing-led events, including talks, workshops, launches, and experiential activities, ensuring alignment with brand objectives and delivering meaningful audience engagement.
  • Track and analyse campaign results and customer data to identify optimisation opportunities, and produce timely performance reports to keep the management team informed.
  • Manage and coordinate external vendors and agencies, ensuring deliverables meet quality standards, timelines, and budget requirements.
  • Support all business units in driving overall revenue growth and achieving organisational objectives.
  • Ensure marketing budgets, processes, assets, and production timelines are aligned with overall marketing strategies.
  • Provide guidance, coaching, and mentorship to marketing team members to build capability and improve performance.
  • Leverage digital tools and data analytics to improve marketing effectiveness and return on investment (ROI).

Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Marketing, Communications, Business Management, or a related discipline, with a minimum of 5 years’ relevant experience in marketing, brand and content management.
  • Proven experience in digital marketing and brand promotion, with a strong track record of delivering campaigns that achieve measurable ROI.
  • Excellent command of English, both written and spoken; proficiency in Chinese is an advantage.
  • Highly organised and proactive self-starter, able to prioritise effectively, manage multiple projects, and meet tight deadlines while taking ownership of outcomes.
  • Creative and strategic thinker with a solid understanding of creative production processes and a strong grasp of social media and emerging trends.
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills, with the ability to manage external partners and collaborate effectively with internal stakeholders across teams.
  • Analytical and detail-oriented, with the ability to think strategically and contribute fresh, well-considered ideas to marketing initiatives.

Interested candidates please submit your detailed resume, current & expected salary and date available.

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Company Info

Established in 1984, Way OnNet Group Pte Ltd is the largest professional feng shui consultancy firm in Singapore. By integrating ancient feng shui knowledge with the latest in quality management, Way OnNet is able to provide accuracy, dependability and high quality in our services. Not only does this allow us to become the leader in the feng shui industry, it also serves as a guarantee to our clients’ benefits. Recognised for our superior quality management, Way OnNet has been accredited with ISO 9001:2015 since 1997. With a history of over 30 years, Way OnNet has been providing excellent and trustworthy services to our clients, earning prestige amongst our wide clientele. Singapore provides the biggest clientele, but droves flock in from Hong Kong, China, Australia, Europe, USA and other Southeast Asian countries too. Way OnNet Group consists of five business divisions: namely Consultancy, E-Commerce, Publication, Retail and Education. Each contributes to the success of Way OnNet Group and the blossoming of the feng shui industry.
postedCompany.name: WAY ONNET GROUP PTE LTD
